meaning: n.<美>(=misdemeanour)[律]轻罪,(与felony相对,英国1967年刑法条例已废除misdemeanour和felony之间的一切区别)
examples: On most planets murder is a misdemeanor; on some it is a praiseworthy act.
The case is now being investigated as filing a false report, a misdemeanor.
Graves, Hunt's attorney, had earlier asked that the charges be reduced to a misdemeanor.
Mr. Webber eventually pleaded guilty to a criminal contempt misdemeanor and performed community service.
